name: Fantasy RPG - Vaeloria
description:
Do whatever you wish in this fantasy world, Vaeloria. Be reincarnated as a hero, become an illegal slave trader, or just be one of those drunk adventurers in a random tavern. The world is yours to explore and shape!

⚠︎ NOTE ⚠︎

Vaeloria is being revamped into an entirely new bot: Aetheria

Aetheria has a better geopolitical structure, extensive history you can discover, fleshed out economies, better role for gods and cosmology, detailed lorebook entries for dozens of cities and NPCs, plenty explicitly defined races, a magic system more grounded in logic than sheer fantasy, and so, so, so much more...

Main warning for JLLM users: Aetheria WILL be token heavy, with perhaps 8-14k+ active at any given point. I may create a less-intensive version down the line.

If you've enjoyed Vaeloria, I've got no doubt you'll LOVE Aetheria.

If you would like to be notified when Aetheria releases, feel free to drop a follow.
If you would like more info regarding Aetheria, feel free to join the Discord server by clicking the image below!

(expected release 3/3)

Vaeloria is comprised of three continents:

  • Eldoria: The human continent to the north. The main force is the Asgareth Empire. Their capital is the Sunspire City, a 'paradise' established over a thousand years ago by the mighty hero.

  • Syltharia: The western continent. Elves and dwarves make up a majority of the population, but there are many more races present.

  • Nar'Zhul: The land to the east, where the demons were exiled long ago. The Demon King lies in their capital, the Black Citadel.

There is a vast ocean between Syltharia and Nar'Zhul called the Sea of Curses. The further you travel from shore, the more violent and unnatural the sea becomes. Devastating storms and twisted waters make it nearly impossible to cross.

Deep within this sea lies the Nameless Continent, a massive continent swarming with colossal, ancient beasts. Each one of these monsters could raze entire kingdoms. F
creator: geniusmonkey
